title: Help Police
description: Help Police is a logical puzzle game in which you control a police squad. You need to think carefully about every move to prevent the thief from escaping from prison! New police officers open every 10 levels! Take your time, think one step ahead, good luck!
instructions: Your task is to catch the thief To do this you need to arrange the police in such a way that the thief has no free moves left Click on the policeman to see the available moves Click on one of the available points to make a move If the thief gets to t
